advisories: Frequent/Intense Alcohol, Tobacco, or Drug Use or References
results.releaseNotes:
The Slushy Calculator Is Here!
Developed by Jeffrey Morgenthaler, the Slushy Calculator turns any cocktail recipe into a properly textured frozen drink — every time.

- Scales any recipe to your slushy machine's capacity (or any batch size you choose)
- Uses your refractometer reading to calculate exactly how much simple syrup and water to add for the perfect texture
- Estimates how many servings your batch will yield
- Catches recipes that are too high in alcohol to slush and points you toward a fix
- Save your slushy as a new recipe, or share it as a PDF, CSV, printed page, or plain text
- Works for non-alcoholic drinks too

Find it in the Calculators tab, or tap "Slushy" on any recipe to turn what you already have into a frozen drink.

Thanks for using Bevnap! Questions or feedback — email
hello@lemel.dev. We read every message.
results.description:
Your personal cocktail companion. Discover, create, and perfect your favorite drinks with Bevnap - the complete recipe management app for home bartenders and cocktail enthusiasts.

DISCOVER RECIPES
Browse beautifully designed cocktail recipes with detailed ingredients, step-by-step directions, and stunning photos. Find the perfect drink by searching by name, ingredient, spirit, or category. Whether you're looking for a classic Old Fashioned or exploring modern craft cocktails, every recipe is at your fingertips.

INGREDIENT LOOKUP
Wondering what to make with that bottle of Campari? Tap any ingredient to instantly see every cocktail in your library that uses it. A simple way to discover new drinks and get the most out of what you have.

CREATE YOUR OWN
Build and save your own signature cocktails. Add custom ingredients, write detailed directions, and capture beautiful photos of your creations. Organize recipes into personal collections for easy access.

PROFESSIONAL CALCULATORS
 - Batch Calculator - Scale any recipe for parties and events
 - Syrup Calculator - Make professional-quality syrups at home
 - Slushy Calculator - Perfect frozen drinks every time
 - Carbonation Calculator - Calculate CO₂ pressure for sparkling cocktails, sodas, and draft dispense — built with Crossroads Consulting and Jeffrey Morgenthaler
 - What Can I Make? - Discover cocktails you can make with what you have
 - Recipe Costing - Calculate pour costs and set profitable menu prices
-  ABV Calculator - Track alcohol content and dilution

RECIPE COLLECTIONS
Download curated recipe packs from Jeffrey Morgenthaler. Explore themed collections like Jeffrey Morgenthaler's Signature Cocktails, Modern Classics, Bourbon/Rye Cocktails and more. New collections added regularly.

SHARE WITH FRIENDS
Connect with friends to share recipes and collections directly in the app. Export beautiful recipe cards as PDFs. Create shareable menus for your home bar or next party.

SYNC EVERYWHERE
Your recipes, ingredients, and collections sync automatically via iCloud. Start on your iPhone, continue on your iPad. Everything stays perfectly in sync.

CUSTOMIZE YOUR EXPERIENCE
 - Multiple beautiful themes (Ocean, Sunset, Light, Dark)
 - Flexible measurement units (oz, ml, cl, and more)
 - Bartender-standard unit conversions
 - Keep screen on while mixing
 - Full search across all your content

Whether you're a professional bartender, managing a bar/restaurant, hosting a cocktail party, learning mixology fundamentals, or perfecting your craft, Bevnap gives you everything you need to mix with confidence.

Download now and discover your next favorite cocktail.
